hero.sub: Zwa nimero ya telefone ya ofele mpe ya libateli mpo na kobenga mpe kotinda ba message na mokili mobimba na nzela ya Wi-Fi to data. why.title: Why people switch to Chatforia
why.subtitle: Chatforia gives you a real phone number, smart translation, and a clear path to go ad-free when you’re ready.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: Modern app, global-first design, and built-in translation instead of old-school call forwarding.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs chat apps
messengers.body: Text real phone numbers — not just other app users — with AI and status built in. Great if you’re coming from apps like TextFree or TextMe.

feature.aiTools: Bisaleli ya AI (kokoma lisusu, biyano, ba résumés)

why.disclaimer: Comparison based on publicly available information and may change over time. Other free-texting apps like TextFree or TextMe are generally similar to TextNow.

faq.title: Mituna mingi etali ntalo & ba plans

free.q: Plan ya Ofele ezali mpenza ofele?
free.a: Iyo. Plan ya Ofele ezali na nimero ya Chatforia, kobenga, mpe kotinda bamessage na ba publicités. Okoki kotikala na Plan ya Ofele ntango nyonso olingi, to mpe komata na plan ya likolo mpo na kolongola ba publicités mpe kofungola makambo mosusu.

plusPremium.q: Bokeseni nini ezali kati na Plus mpe Premium?
plusPremium.a: Plus elongolaka ba publicités mpe ebakisaka bomoi ya ba messages na yo — malamu mpenza mpo na kosalela mokolo na mokolo. Premium ebakisaka makoki ya kobongisa makambo ndenge olingi, bisaleli ya AI mpo na kokoma lisusu mpe koyanola, mpe lisungi ya liboso mpo na bato oyo basalelaka mingi.

esim.q: Ba packs ya données ya eSIM esalaka wapi?
esim.a: Iyo. Okoki ko gérer to kokatisa abonnement na yo uta na lokasa ya kofuta na kati ya application. Mbongwana ekokota na mosala na suka ya eleko na yo ya kofuta ya sikoyo.

cancel.q: Can I cancel or change plans anytime?
cancel.a: Yes. You can manage or cancel your subscription from the billing page in the app. Changes take effect at the end of your current billing period.

family.q: Ba packs ya Libota esalaka ndenge nini?
family.a: Ba packs ya Libota esalaka esika moko ya kosangela ba données kati na ba comptes ebele ya Chatforia. Moto moko afutaka facture , mpe okoki kobenga to kolongola bato mosusu mpe kotia ndelo mpo na moto na moto.

howItWorks.title: How Chatforia Works
howItWorks.intro: Chatforia is designed to make communication simple, fast, and accessible. Getting started takes just a few steps.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Sign up using your email or username to create your Chatforia account.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Connect with others by selecting contacts or starting new chats.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Messages are delivered quickly to provide a smooth communication experience.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Built-in translation helps users communicate across different languages.
howItWorks.step5Desc: Manage your preferences, contacts, and communication settings.

safety.title: Safety & Community Guidelines
safety.intro: Chatforia is committed to maintaining a safe and respectful environment for all users. These guidelines help ensure a positive experience for everyone.
safety.respectDesc: Users are expected to communicate respectfully. Harassment, abuse, or harmful behavior is not permitted.

tools.block: Block users to prevent further interaction

safety.enforcementDesc: We may take action against accounts that violate these guidelines, including warnings, restrictions, or permanent removal from the platform.

whyMessaging.title: Mpo na nini ba plateformes ya kotinda ba message ezali na ntina mingi koleka liboso
whyMessaging.intro: Ba plateformes ya kotinda ba message ekomi moko ya bisaleli ya ntina mingi mpo na communication na mokili ya lelo. Kobanda na masolo ya moto na moto kino na boyokani ya mosala, ba applications ya kotinda ba message epesaka bato nzela ya kotikala na boyokani mbala moko mpe na ndenge ya malamu.
whyMessaging.everydayDesc: Bato batalelaka ba applications ya message mpo na kosolola mokolo na mokolo na baninga, libota, mpe baninga ya mosala. Ezala sango ya mbalakaka to lisolo ya molai, message epesaka nzela ya pete mpe ya kobongwana mpo na kotikala na boyokani.
whyMessaging.speedDesc: Moko ya matomba ya minene ya ba plateformes ya kotinda ba messages ezali vitese na yango. Ba messages ekómaka na mbala moko, kopesaka nzela na basali ete basolola na tango yango mpenza. Bopete oyo esali ete kotinda ba messages ekoma lolenge ya liboso ya kosolola mpo na bato ebele.
whyMessaging.globalDesc: Ba plateformes ya kotinda ba message esangisaka bato na mokili mobimba. Soki bato bazali na accès na internet, bakoki kosolola esika nyonso bazali, yango ekomisaka pete mpo na kotonga boyokani mpe kosala elongo na mikili misusu.
whyMessaging.privacyDesc: Ba plateformes ya sika ya kotinda ba messages etyaka makanisi na kopesa basali bokonzi likolo ya ba données na bango mpe masolo na bango. Ba fonctionnalités lokola cryptage, ba paramètres ya confidentialité, mpe bokonzi likolo ya ba messages epesaka basali nzela ya kosolola na bondimi.
whyMessaging.futureDesc: Kotinda ba messages ezali kokoba kobongwana na ba fonctionnalités ya sika lokola biyano oyo esalemi na AI, kobongola minoko, mpe kokabola ba contenus multimédia. Ndenge technologie ezali kokende liboso, ba plateformes ya kotinda ba messages ekokoma na makasi mingi koleka mpe ekoki kosala makambo ebele koleka.
whyMessaging.outro: Chatforia esalemi na kolanda mitindo oyo, mpo na kopesa lolenge ya kotinda bamessage ya mbangu, ya libateli, mpe ya pete mpo na mosaleli na mokili mobimba oyo ekangisami.

global.title: Avenir ya Communication na Mokili Mobimba
global.intro: Communication ebongwani na lombangu na mibu ntuku mibale oyo eleki. Makambo oyo ezalaki kosenga kobenga na telefone to kokutana miso na miso, sikoyo ekoki kosalema noki na nzela ya ba plateformes ya message. Lokola technologie ezali kokoba kokola, communication ya mokili mobimba ezali kokoma noki koleka, pete koleka mpo na moto nyonso, mpe ya kosangisa bato nyonso koleka.
global.barriersDesc: Moko ya mbongwana ya monene na communication ezali kokita ya bapekiseli ya bisika. Bato bakoki sikoyo kosolola na bato mosusu na mokili mobimba pene na tango moko. Ezala mpo na masolo ya moto na moto, mpo na mombongo, to mpo na kosala elongo, ba plateformes ya kotinda bamessage esali ete mosika ezala lisusu likambo ya kopekisa te.
global.translationTitle: Ntina ya Technologie ya Kobongola Maloba
global.translationDesc: Lokota ezalaki banda kala moko ya mikakatano ya minene mpo na bosololi na mokili mobimba. Lelo oyo, bisaleli ya kobongola oyo etongami na kati esalisaka mpo na kokanga libulu wana. Ba plateformes lokola Chatforia epesaka nzela na basali ete basolola na pete ata soki balobaka nkota ekeseni, mpe yango efungolaka banzela ya sika mpo na boyokani mpe bososoli.
global.realtimeDesc: Lembo ezali likambo ya ntina oyo etongaka bosololi ya mikolo oyo. Basali balingaka ete bamessage etindama noki, mpe bibongiseli ya mikolo oyo esungaka elikia wana. Kotinda bamessage na ntango ya solo epesaka nzela na masolo ya naturel mpe ya pete.
global.privacyDesc: Lokola communication ezali kokoma mingi ya digital, bomoi ya sekele mpe libateli ezali kokoma na ntina mingi koleka. Basaleli balingaka kozala na bondimi ete masolo na bango ebatelami. Ba fonctionnalités lokola cryptage mpe ba paramètres oyo basaleli bango moko bakambaka esungaka mpo na expérience ya communication ya libateli koleka.
global.futureDesc: Avenir ya communication na mokili mobimba ekomonana ekozala na bisaleli ya mayele koleka, lokola kotinda ba message na lisalisi ya AI, traductions oyo ebongisami, mpe ba expériences ya basali oyo ekomisi malamu koleka. Ndenge technologie ezali kokola, communication ekokoba kokoma pete mpo na kososola mpe ya kokoma na esika nyonso.
global.outro: Ba plateformes lokola Chatforia ezali eteni ya mbongwana oyo, kosalisaka bato bákangama na pɛtɛɛ koleka na nzela ya nkota mpe bandelo ndenge na ndenge.

chatSafely.title: Ndenge nini ya kosolola na sécurité na internet
chatSafely.intro: Kosolola na internet ekomisi yango pete koleka mpo na kokutana na bato na mokili mobimba. Ezala ozali kotindela baninga ba message, kokutana na bato ya sika, to kosala mosala elongo na bato mosusu, ba plateformes ya kotinda ba message ezali na esika monene na bomoi ya mokolo na mokolo. Kasi, kobatela sécurité na yo na internet ezali na ntina lokola kaka kotikala na boyokani na bato.

personalInfo.title: Bátela bansango na yo ya personnel
personalInfo.body: Moko ya mibeko ya ntina mingi ya libateli na internet ezali ya koboya kokabola bansango ya personnel oyo etali yo makasi. Na kati na yango, adresi na yo ya ndako, makambo etali mosolo na yo, ba mots de passe, to mpe eloko nyonso oyo ekoki koyebisa nani yo oyo bakoki kosalela mabe. Ata na masolo ya pamba, ezali malamu kokeba na makambo oyo ozali kokabola mpe na nani ozali kokabola yango.

safetyFeatures.title: Use Built-In Safety Features
safetyFeatures.body: Modern messaging platforms like Chatforia provide tools to help users stay safe. Features such as blocking, reporting, and privacy controls are designed to give users control over their experience. If someone behaves inappropriately or makes you uncomfortable, you should use these tools immediately.

scams.title: Be Aware of Scams
scams.body: Scammers often use messaging platforms to trick users into sharing personal information or sending money. Be cautious of messages that seem too good to be true, such as unexpected offers, urgent requests, or unfamiliar links. Always verify the identity of the person you're communicating with before taking any action.

responsibly.title: Communicate Responsibly
responsibly.body: Respectful communication helps create a safer environment for everyone. Avoid engaging in harmful or abusive conversations, and be mindful of how your words may affect others. Positive interactions contribute to a better experience for all users.

whySafety.title: Why Online Safety Matters
whySafety.body: As digital communication continues to grow, maintaining safety and trust becomes increasingly important. By following basic safety practices and using available tools, users can enjoy the benefits of messaging while minimizing risks.

chatSafely.conclusion: Staying safe online doesn’t require advanced technical knowledge—just awareness, caution, and good judgment. With the right habits, you can communicate confidently and securely.

about.title: Mpo na Chatforia
about.description: Chatforia ezali application ya kotinda ba message ya bokengi mpe ya nkota ebele, oyo ezali na cryptage ya suka-na-suka (E2E), kobongola mbala moko, mpe kobenga na mongongo/video. Mokano na biso ezali pete: kosalisa bato bákangama—na bokengi, na sekele, mpe na nkota nyonso.

 Bobongoli, kobomba bakopi, mpe bosanganisi ya ba aparɛyi esalemi mpo na kokitisa makambo oyo basɛrvɛrɛ na biso ekoki komona.

press.boilerplateBody: Chatforia ezali application ya kotinda bamessage oyo etie liboso bomoi ya sekele, oyo esalaka ete kosolola na nkota ekeseni ezala pɛtɛɛ. Bamess -suka tii na suka na cryptage ya automatique, mpe ebongiseli ya kobongola ya kati esimbaka minoko koleka 100 na ntango mpenza. careers.title: Careers
careers.intro: We’re a small founding team building Chatforia — a private, global messenger launching on web, iOS, and Android. If you care about privacy, encryption, and delightful user experiences, we’d love to hear from you.
careers.openRoles: Open founding roles: Lead Full-stack Engineer, Backend Engineer (Node.js), Frontend/Web Engineer (React), Mobile Engineer (iOS), Mobile Engineer (Android), DevOps/SRE, Security & Encryption Engineer, Telecom Engineer (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: How to apply: Use the button below to email your resume and links.
careers.whyBullets:
• Help build the foundation of a new global messenger.
• Ship improvements used across web, iOS, and Android.
• Work directly with the founder on architecture and product direction.
• Own high-impact areas of the stack: messaging, voice, video, encryption, telecom, AI.
• Join at the beginning — before the user base scales.
